phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ingresso principale, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH ling-GRES-so preen-chee-PAH-leh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAHN-toh COS-tah eel bee-lyet-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si compra un biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KOH-meh see KOM-prah oon bee-lyet-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office or online.

responses.english: At the ticket office or online.

phrases.pronunciation: chay LOH-peh-rah een proh-GRAHM-mah stah SEH-rah

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there is an opera tonight.

responses.english: Yes, there is an opera tonight.
